text: Planning a trip is always exciting, and my journey to Japan was no exception. I spent weeks researching flights, hotels, and must-see spots, but nothing prepared me for the new cultures I encountered. The food was incredible—from steaming bowls of ramen to delicate sushi, every meal felt like an adventure. However, language barriers made simple tasks tricky, like ordering coffee or asking for directions. Despite the struggles, the warm smiles of locals helped me feel at home. Looking back, those memories—the vibrant streets, the unfamiliar flavors, and the laughter over miscommunication—are my most treasured souvenirs.
